For reference I am 5'5, between 185-195lbs and Amazon suggested a size 13, I went with size 15 so if after the first wash they shrink I don't risk not being able to fit them. I have plenty of wiggle room, but not so much that they're baggy or unflattering. 15 is ✨️PERFECT✨️. I bought the Jenna and Camille jeans (the picture of jeans with the flame belt are the Camille).

These jeans are so nice! I love that they are hemmed but they still fit me well, which is an accomplishment considering I am very petite and have a hard time finding that combo. I am 5'0", ~125lbs, 29" waist, 41" hips, typically size 4-6. I got these in the color black in the size 8 - I chose to size up to be safe and I hate clothing that squeezes me. These are nice and stretchy but they do have good structure. The pocket detailing is unique and fun. The length is perfect if you are petite like me but I imagine they would be shorter on taller people. Overall, love these pants and will be buying more colors!

These jeans are so soft and comfortable. They have a nice amount of stretch. I was a little skeptical of the sizing, but the XL fit me great. For reference, I am 5'5" 190lbs and normally wear a size 14-16 US women's jeans. I wasn't sure about the trouser, wide leg, flare style as I normally wear a bootcut. As comfortable and as nice as these are, I don't love the leg style on my body. I would definitely like to try them out in another cut though. I have not washed them yet, but they seem durable as like they will hold up fine.

These jeans are SO wide they did not look good on me at all, which is too bad bc otherwise they're cute. I'm 5"1 and wear a size small, and these were comically wide on me and fell at a very weird length, above the ankles, but since they're so wide they don't look like capris, they just look weird. If they were 5" longer they might work as super wide jeans, but the length makes them look like you're wearing a big triangle. However I'm still giving them 5 stars bc the quality is quite good. I was impressed that the fly was lined (see pic) and overall they're nice thick, non-cheap feeling denim, well constructed. Also the picture shows that they're wide, so there was nothing misleading, it just wasn't a flattering style on me.

These jeans are so worth every dime you spend on them! After falling in love with True Religion jeans years ago, I decided that I would just stock up. I own over ten pairs of the jeans! I had to buy these on Amazon because I lost some weight and none of my jeans look good on me anymore. So glad Amazon has these guys on sale! I would say these jeans fit true to size. If you're tall like me, you will love the length of these jeans. I'm 5'9", 150 lbs, and I ordered a 28.

These jeans are somewhat thick but it's cotton-polyester-viscose-spandex material mix makes it softer & somewhat stretchy for its thickness. It can feel a little hot to wear during warm to hot weather though. The pants legs are also about an inch too long on my daughter's 5'5 ft pear-shaped figure (see pic). Hoping that washing this against its recommendations (i.e., cold wash, hang to dry) in warm washer water and drying them on high heat will cause them to shrink some in length to fit her better. Shrinking sideways would also enable its somewhat wider waistband fit her better without needing a belt. Got her the size 12 based on its Amazon size chart and is true to size. She pairs these wide leg jeans with a fitted Y2K top to complete her Y2K style. Looks good on her. Recommended.

These jeans are sooo comfortable!!! They have a bit of stretch to them so they're form-fitting. I am 5'6 and 175lbs and the size 12 fit me perfectly. I rolled them up to wear with boots as they are a bit longer than other skinny jeans I have, but I enjoy that diversity. Highly recommend these Levi jeans!

These jeans are stylish and of exceptional quality. I ordered size 4 for my daughter, who is 5'2" and weighs 95lbs. They fit well, and she loves the cargo style. The material is comfortable and doesn't fade or shrink. The quality is worth the price.

These jeans are stylish and of exceptional quality. I ordered size 4 for my daughter, who is 5'2" and weighs 95lbs. They fit well, and she loves the cargo style. The material is comfortable and doesn't fade or shrink. The quality is worth the price.
These jeans are super comfortable and the size is perfect.. I got a size 12 and they fit perfect!! I am 5’5 and got the standard size!! Love them!! The color is dark! Love them!!

These jeans are super comfortable! They have a ton of stretch and are a lightweight denim blend. I typically wear an 8-10 in women's jeans and ordered these in the M and they fit how I expected. I love the color and the big cuffs on the bottom of the leg opening. I am a short girl (5'3") so these are slightly long to wear with tennis shoes but will work perfect with a slight heel or boot!
